rows.asset_name: GS Buffered PLUS Based on the Value of the EURO STOXX 50 Index due Oct 3,2019 (SPVOA)
MS Trigger PLUS Based on the Value of the EURO STOXX Banks Index due Nov 5, 2019 (SPWQR)

uncertainties.read: TRANSPOSED Schedule B grid: each COLUMN is one transaction (10 columns). Top rows carry EIF marker + SP owner + asset name + ticker + P/S type; the middle is an unlabeled amount-of-transaction bucket matrix (X marks appear as dark bars); dates are the bottom row. Amount buckets and cap_gain_over_200 rows are unlabeled on this sheet (labels off-page) and degraded, so amount=null and cap_gain_over_200=null for every tx. owner/asset/ticker/tx_type/date captured. Header 'M and R Schedule B' = M & R Trust Partnership Schedule B.
uncertainties.note: downstream: amounts require the row-label key from the schedule header page to resolve the transposed matrix
